creator: kamikaze@bsdforen.de
text:
I assume this is a mirroring problem (as has been suggested
by a number of people on the ports@ mailing list).

To fix this a mirror would have to update in the following way:
1) Download the new INDEX into a temporary location.
2) Download all packages listed in the new index file.
3) Overwrite the old INDEX with the new one.
4) Delete all packages no longer listed.

I suppose mirroring solutions are normally more generic and
not this content specific. But the problem could also be
remedied by priorizing new files over updating files. This
way the packages would all be present before the INDEX file
got updated.
And of course, deleting files would have to come last.
